name: Call of Farming
short_description: A game for you to create your own farming or simulation game. It includes an inventory, craft, building, growing plants, farm animals and much more.
detailed_description:
A game where you can create your own farming or simulation game. It includes an inventory, crafting, buildings, growing plants, farm animals and much more.

Call of Farming includes everything you need in a farming or simulation themed build. Add new items, structures, plants and animals, customize it to your needs.



Key Features

  • Top-Down, Third Person or First Person
  • Inventory system
  • Crafting system
  • Equipment (depending on character)
  • Resource gathering
  • Character attributes (health, energy...)
  • Farming (Seed planting, plant/fruit growing, hoeing, irrigation)
  • Farm Animals (eat, grow, produce)
  • Wild Animal behavior (wandering, running away, chasing)
  • Hunting and Fishing
  • Food and cooking
  • NPC shop to buy/sell items
  • Combat (attack and hp)
  • Product durability and food spoilage
  • Storage boxes (chest)
  • Domestic animals (chasing, attacking and digging behaviors)
  • Riding
  • Level system and XP
  • Bonus effects (Consumables or equipment that increase stats).
  • Game clock, day/night cycle
  • Save/load system



Art

  • Animated characters (male and female)
  • Animated animals (cow, sheep, chicken, pig, deer, bear, squirrel, bird...)
  • Base material (wood, grass, rock, straw...)
  • Gathering tools (hoe, scythe, axe, pickaxe, fishing rod, ...)
  • Food (fruits, apples, nuts, meat, fish, ...)
  • Cooked foods (tacos, popcorn, bread...)
  • Structures (fences, barbecue, crate...)
  • Environment (trees, bushes, rocks, ground patterns...)
  • Agricultural plants (strawberry, pumpkin, pepper, tomato, wheat...)
  • Town models (lamp, bench, houses, shop stand...)
  • All 2D icons for interactive models
